item.title: Turning in a Planter
item.description: Laura Farms shows a simple planter turn-in moment from the field, highlighting the hands-on work and steady rhythm of farm life.

media:content.media:title: Turning in a Planter
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows a simple planter turn-in moment from the field, highlighting the hands-on work and steady rhythm of farm life.

item.title: Reviving a 6x6 Military Truck
item.description: Laura Farms takes on reviving a 6x6 military truck, sharing a hands-on look at the work, teamwork, and problem-solving behind the project.

media:content.media:title: Reviving a 6x6 Military Truck
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on reviving a 6x6 military truck, sharing a hands-on look at the work, teamwork, and problem-solving behind the project.

item.title: This Feels So Wrong...
item.description: Laura Farms shares a farm moment that just doesn’t feel right, capturing the realities of daily work and the challenges that come with it.

media:content.media:title: This Feels So Wrong...
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a farm moment that just doesn’t feel right, capturing the realities of daily work and the challenges that come with it.

item.title: How Soybeans Go From Field to Table
item.description: Laura Farms shows the soybean journey from field to table in a clear, hands-on look at farm life and the work behind the crop.

media:content.media:title: How Soybeans Go From Field to Table
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows the soybean journey from field to table in a clear, hands-on look at farm life and the work behind the crop.

item.title: Exploring a Tractor Graveyard
item.description: Laura Farms takes a look around a tractor graveyard, sharing a simple farm-life moment with old machinery and a curious eye for the past.

media:content.media:title: Exploring a Tractor Graveyard
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes a look around a tractor graveyard, sharing a simple farm-life moment with old machinery and a curious eye for the past.

item.title: Riding in an Australian Road Train
item.description: Laura Farms shares a ride in an Australian road train, giving a simple look at a big piece of farm machinery and life on the move.

media:content.media:title: Riding in an Australian Road Train
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a ride in an Australian road train, giving a simple look at a big piece of farm machinery and life on the move.

item.title: Buying Out Old Farm Equipment
item.description: Laura Farms takes on a big equipment haul, bringing home old farm machinery and putting it to work on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Buying Out Old Farm Equipment
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on a big equipment haul, bringing home old farm machinery and putting it to work on the farm.

item.title: This One Job Made Me $50,000
item.description: Laura Farms shares the one job that made $50,000, giving a straightforward look at farm work and the value of getting the job done right.

media:content.media:title: This One Job Made Me $50,000
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares the one job that made $50,000, giving a straightforward look at farm work and the value of getting the job done right.

item.title: Bailing Hay with a Hesston 565
item.description: Laura Farms bails hay with a Hesston 565, showing a steady day of farm work and machinery in action.

media:content.media:title: Bailing Hay with a Hesston 565
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms bails hay with a Hesston 565, showing a steady day of farm work and machinery in action.

item.title: Saving an Abandoned Dozer from a Pond
item.description: Laura Farms takes on the challenge of recovering an abandoned dozer from a pond, showing the teamwork and determination behind farm machinery work.

media:content.media:title: Saving an Abandoned Dozer from a Pond
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on the challenge of recovering an abandoned dozer from a pond, showing the teamwork and determination behind farm machinery work.

item.title: Laura Farms Buys a Round Baler
item.description: Laura Farms shares the excitement of buying a round baler and adding a new piece of machinery to the farm.

media:content.media:title: Laura Farms Buys a Round Baler
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares the excitement of buying a round baler and adding a new piece of machinery to the farm.
